fields.title: Pin autoresearch segments to execution profiles instead of ambient session state
fields.description: Autoresearch should run against a reproducible execution environment. Today it is still ambient-session driven. Capture and pin execution profiles per segment so autoresearch resumes with the same mode/model/thinking/policy it was initialized with.
fields.design: Extend autoresearch segment/config state with a pinned executionProfile. Capture the current resolved execution profile during init_experiment. Reapply the pinned profile before resume or auto-resume. Update app/runtime wiring so autoresearch depends on execution services, not just sandbox. Use strict behavior for legacy segments without a pinned profile: require re-init rather than silently guessing from ambient session state.
